ddls:
CREATE TABLE "peripherals" (
  "peripheral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peripheral */,
  "address" TEXT /* Memory address of the peripheral */,
  "peripheral_name" TEXT /* Name of the peripheral */,
  "peripheral_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the peripheral */,
  "pio_support" TEXT /* Whether the peripheral supports Programmable Input/Output (PIO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the peripheral */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated MCU */,
  "last_configured_date" TEXT /* Last date the peripheral was configured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the peripheral (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the peripheral firmware or hardware */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peripheral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripherals_peripheral_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("peripheral_type_id") REFERENCES peripheral_types ("peripheral_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripherals_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES mcus ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mcus" (
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MCU */,
  "mcu_name" TEXT /* Name of the MCU */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the MCU */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the MCU */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the MCU was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MCU */,
  "operating_voltage" TEXT /* Operating voltage of the MCU */,
  "operating_frequency" TEXT /* Operating frequency of the MCU */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range in which the MCU can operate */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins on the MCU */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peripheral_types" (
  "peripheral_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peripheral type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the peripheral type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the peripheral type */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Communication protocol used by the peripheral */,
  "max_data_rate" TEXT /* Maximum data rate supported by the peripheral */,
  "power_consumption" TEXT /* Power consumption of the peripheral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peripheral_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mcu_peripherals" (
  "mcu_peripheral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MCU-peripheral association */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MCU */,
  "peripheral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peripheral */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the peripheral was installed on the MCU */,
  "installation_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who installed the peripheral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcu_peripheral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mcu_peripherals_installation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mcu_peripherals_peripheral_id FOREIGN KEY ("peripheral_id") REFERENCES peripherals ("peripheral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mcu_peripherals_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES mcus ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peripheral_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "peripheral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peripheral */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was applied */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who applied the configuration */,
  "config_version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., applied, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_configurations_peripheral_id FOREIGN KEY ("peripheral_id") REFERENCES peripherals ("peripheral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peripheral_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "peripheral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peripheral */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., usage, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the log */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_logs_peripheral_id FOREIGN KEY ("peripheral_id") REFERENCES peripherals ("peripheral_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "peripheral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peripheral */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of the maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date for pending maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_peripheral_id FOREIGN KEY ("peripheral_id") REFERENCES peripherals ("peripheral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peripheral_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "peripheral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peripheral */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., usage, performance) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_reports_peripheral_id FOREIGN KEY ("peripheral_id") REFERENCES peripherals ("peripheral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peripheral_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
